concept.description: Labels all types annotated with @javax.ws.rs.Path with "JaxRS", "PathResource", "JEE" and "Injectable".
concept.cypher: MATCH (t:Java:Type)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->()-[:OF_TYPE]-(:Java:Type {fqn: "javax.ws.rs.Path"}) SET t:JaxRS:PathResource:JEE:Injectable RETURN t AS PathResource

concept.description: Labels all types annotated with @javax.ws.rs.Path with "JaxRS", "PathResource", "JEE" and "Injectable".
concept.cypher: MATCH (t:Java:Type)-[:DECLARES]->(m:Java:Method), (m)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->()-[:OF_TYPE]-(:Java:Type {fqn: "javax.ws.rs.Path"}) SET t:JaxRS:PathResource:JEE:Injectable RETURN t AS PathResource
